utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 corresponding fields. Now check if each is fully specified: 
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – fully specified.
- travel_dates: Provided with specific dates (October 15–19, 2024) – fully specified.
- transportation: Provided with airline class and round-trip fare (€140) but lacks specific flight details (e.g., airline name confirmation, flight numbers, times). The format asks for flight details with costs; partial.
- accommodation: Provided with hotel type/quality and costs (€135/night, total €540) but no hotel name or address; format asks for hotel selection with costs. Selection implies a specific property; partial.
- activities: Listed with names and costs; fully specified enough per format (“selected activities with costs”) – acceptable.
- additional_services: Provided (bank travel notifications) but no costs; format says “any extra services with costs.” Cost missing; partial.
- total_budget: Provided (€905) – fully specified.
Thus, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, activities, total_budget = 4/7.
